topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

inputs.topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

lesson.teacherObjective: After this lesson, you will be able to create a Gmail account from scratch on your Android phone.
lesson.teacherExplanation:
Today we will learn how to create a Gmail account on your Android phone. This email account is useful for communication with businesses, schools, and friends professionally. Unlike WhatsApp, email is often used for more formal situations, such as sending job applications or important documents.

In our community, businesses like Inkify use email to send quotes and invoices to their clients. This ensures that both parties have a clear record of communication and transactions, which builds trust and professionalism.

You will create your Gmail account step by step. This lesson will show you how to set it up and start using it by sending your first practice email. By the end, you will have a professional email address you can use for various purposes.
teacherDiscussionQuestions: Why might a business prefer using email for important communication?
What are some benefits of having a professional email address?
How do you think creating an email account can help you in your daily life?
lesson.teacherLocalExample: Inkify, a local printing business run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, frequently uses Gmail to communicate efficiently with their clients. They send detailed quotes via email, allowing clients to have all information stored for future reference.
teacherTimeGuide: 5 min: write board points, students copy
10 min: students do task on phones
5 min: recap — what is one thing you learned?
lesson.taskIntro: You will create a Gmail account on your Android phone.
lesson.taskReflection: Think of a situation where having a professional email might be important for you. What would you use it for and why?

lesson.teacherPlanHTML:
Learning Objective

Create a Gmail Account

After this lesson, you will be able to create a Gmail account from scratch on your Android phone.

✏ Write on the Board
Write these before class starts — students copy them down
  • Gmail is free
  • Use your real name
  • Secure your account
  • Verify with SMS code
  • Privacy matters

2Explain to Students

Read this aloud — then explain in your own words

Today we will learn how to create a Gmail account on your Android phone. This email account is useful for communication with businesses, schools, and friends professionally. Unlike WhatsApp, email is often used for more formal situations, such as sending job applications or important documents.

In our community, businesses like Inkify use email to send quotes and invoices to their clients. This ensures that both parties have a clear record of communication and transactions, which builds trust and professionalism.

You will create your Gmail account step by step. This lesson will show you how to set it up and start using it by sending your first practice email. By the end, you will have a professional email address you can use for various purposes.

3Discussion Questions

  1. 1Why might a business prefer using email for important communication?
  2. 2What are some benefits of having a professional email address?
  3. 3How do you think creating an email account can help you in your daily life?

4Local Example

Inkify, a local printing business run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, frequently uses Gmail to communicate efficiently with their clients. They send detailed quotes via email, allowing clients to have all information stored for future reference.
Time Guide — 30 minutes
5 minwrite board points, students copy
15 minteacher explains
10 minclass discussion
10 minstudents do task on phones
5 minrecap — what is one thing you learned?
